revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Navbox | name = Atsuta Faith | title = [[Atsuta Shrine|Atsuta Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Yamato Takeru at 16-crop.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Atsuta no Ōkami]] *[[Amaterasu]] *[[Susanoo]] *[[Yamato Takeru|Yamatotakeru]] *{{ill|Miyazu-hime|ja|宮簀媛}} *{{ill|Takeinadane|ja|建稲種命}} |group2 = Three Great Shrines |list2 = * [[Kumano Nachi Taisha]] * [[Kumano Hongū Taisha]] * Kumano Hayatama...'
Convert [[Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] to wikilink (The bot operation is completed 43.8% in total)
15 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Kumano_Faith]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Kumano Faith | title = [[Kumano shrine|Kumano Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Three-storied_Pagoda_of_Seiganto-ji_and_Nachi_Falls_201808.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = *{{ill|Kumano Gongen|ja|熊野権現}}
|group2 = Three Great Shrines |list2 = * [[Kumano Nachi Taisha]] * [[Kumano Hongū Taisha]] * [[Kumano Hayatama Taisha]] *Buddhist Temples ** [[Seiganto-ji]] ** [[Fudarakusan-ji]] *Other ** [[Nachi Falls]]
|group3 = Okinawan Shrines |list3 = * [[Ameku-gū]] * [[Naminoue Shrine]] * [[Futemma-gū]] * [[Kin-gū]] * [[Oki-no-gū]] * [[Shikina-gū]] * [[Sueyoshi-gū]]
|group4 = Other Shrines |list4 = * [[Ōji Shrine]] * [[Sacred Sites and Pilgrimage Routes in the Kii Mountain Range]] * [[Kumano Kodō]] * [[Aoyama Kumano Shrine]] * [[Juniso Kumano Shrine]] * [[Kumano Shrine (Yamagata)]]
|group5 = Related Shrines |list5 = * [[Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] * [[Kumano Taisha]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Kumano shrines| ]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:Template" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category::" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "ja|沖宮" to "ja|沖宮|1=Oki-no-gū‎"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Kumano Faith]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125463672)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
